description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Brew Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes inputs for ice version, repository URL, and repository username, and an optional secret for the repository password. It checks out the repository on a macOS environment, sets up C++ and caching, then updates and pushes a nightly Homebrew tap, uploads a nightly bottle to the specified repository, and uploads the bottle as an artifact.
